name: Chow Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the string beans into pieces.
2. Break the cauliflower into flowerets.
3. Add the lima beans and corn, and cook all four ingredients for about 25 minutes.
4. Chop the onions, peppers, and tomatoes.
5. Heat the vinegar until hot, then add the sugar, salt, and mixed spices (celery seed, mustard seed, mustard, and turmeric).
6. Drain any water from the cooked vegetables and add them to the hot vinegar mixture.
7. Add the chopped vegetables and cook for about 25 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Pour into sterilized jars and seal.
